created.description: The creation date of the transaction

effective_date.description: The "effective date" of a transaction. This may be earlier than posted_date in some cases (for example, a transaction that occurs on a Saturday may not be posted until the following Monday, but would have an effective date of Saturday)

idemkey.description: The idempotency key used when initially creating this transaction.

info_only.description: Whether or not this transaction represents a purely informational operation or an actual money movement

lead_mode.description: Whether or not this transaction was created operating in "lead ledger" mode

posted_date.description: The date the transaction was posted. This is the date any money is considered to be added or removed from an account.

reference_id.description: An external ID provided by the payment network to represent this transaction. This will always be null for internal transfers.

subtype.description: The specific transaction type. For example, for `ach`, this may be "outgoing_debit".

tenant.description: The tenant associated with this transaction, in the form "<bankid>_<partnerid>"

type.description: The general type of transaction. For example, "card" or "ach".

updated.description: The date the transaction was last updated

uuid.description: The unique identifier of the transaction.
